text: A jet flying through a  cloudy blue sky.
A cow that's close to the camera man is standing and watching him.
Zebra's are walking around in a zoo cage.
A floating watch tower along a tower on dry land with the tide out.
Water skiers are doing tricks in the air over water.
A cat sitting on a towel on the floor of a bathroom
A row of parked vehicles in front of a tall building.
A pair of men doing tricks on skateboards off of rails.
A boy in the distance has thrown a Frisbee at the camera.
A man and child on beach flying a kite above trees.
